task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: RenameRequest struct with correct json tags (source/destination) ✓, Client.Rename method POSTing to /api/rename ✓, Server RenameHandler implementing copy-then-delete logic with 404 for missing source and 409 for existing destination ✓, Route registration (r.POST) ✓, CLI command with cobra.ExactArgs(2) ✓, CLI handler calling client.Rename ✓, command properly registered in both command lists ✓, no test files modified and all existing code remains intact ✓
